body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-41207", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:L/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-330", "name": "Use of Insufficiently Random Values"}], "description": "HKDF_expand: returns non-NULL on failure. The byte[] is filled with zeros and has no way to distinguish success from failure. Since this output is used as HKDF key material for the response AEAD, a  failure silently produces an all-zero key.\n\nWhen EVP_HPKE_CTX_export fails it also returns an empty byte[] array filled with zeros. This byte[] feeds directly into OHttpCrypto.createResponseAEAD(...).  A silent all-zero export secret would produce a deterministic, attacker-predictable AEAD key.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00193, "percentile": 0.0905}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-f659-372h-6x3x", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-26T23:08:26Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-f659-372h-6x3x", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-f659-372h-6x3x"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41207"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-04T18:16:30Z", "published_at": "2026-05-26T23:08:26Z", "references": ["https://github.com/netty/netty-incubator-codec-ohttp/security/advisories/GHSA-f659-372h-6x3x", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41207", "https://github.com/netty/netty-incubator-codec-ohttp/commit/3d3b4e527fc82ad0fe3db1af951ffd0ec9a10680", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-f659-372h-6x3x"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/netty/netty-incubator-codec-ohttp/security-advisories/GHSA-f659-372h-6x3x", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/netty/netty-incubator-codec-ohttp", "summary": "netty-incubator-codec-ohttp's HPKEContext operations may produce empty byte[] on failures", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-09T11:53:43Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-f659-372h-6x3x", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.0.21.Final", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "io.netty.incubator:netty-incubator-codec-ohttp"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.0.21.Final"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
